warnings: Energy was confirmed to be finite and the SCF process converged.

prose: The frontier-orbitals calculation on oxygen using DFT with B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set, in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3, in PySCF. HOMO energy = -8.87396 eV, LUMO energy = -3.58590 eV, Homo-Lumo gap ≈ 5.28806 eV.
